list.title: Scenarios
list.description: Create and manage conversation scenarios for your AI avatars
list.emptyDescription: Create your first scenario to get started

form.title: Title
form.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt for the AI avatar (e.g., You are a hiring manager conducting a job interview...)
form.systemPromptHelp: This prompt defines the AI avatar's role and behavior during the conversation
form.initialGreetingDescription: This message is played when the session starts
form.initialGreetingPlaceholder: Hello. Let's start the interview. Please introduce yourself.
form.initialGreetingHelp: The AI will speak this greeting at the start of the session. Leave empty to skip.
form.showSilenceTimerDescription: Display silence countdown in the session player UI. Leave unchecked to use organization default.

validation.shortSystemPrompt: Il prompt di sistema è piuttosto breve (meno di 50 caratteri). Considera di aggiungere più dettagli per un migliore comportamento dell'IA.

detail.title: Scenario Details
detail.readOnly: This is a public scenario from another organization. You can use it but cannot edit it.

edit.title: Edit Scenario
edit.configHelp: Enter scenario configuration as valid JSON. Example: { "duration": 30, "difficulty": "beginner" }

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this scenario? This action cannot be undone.

questions.title: Questions List
questions.description: Configure questions for the AI avatar to ask. Drag and drop to reorder.
questions.emptyDescription: Add your first question to design the conversation flow
questions.dragInfo: Drag and drop questions to reorder them
questions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this question?

deleteDialog.title: Delete Question
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this question? This action cannot be undone.

form.hintsPlaceholder:
Please provide specific examples
Base your answer on past experiences
form.evaluationCriteriaHelp: AI will evaluate answers based on these criteria (optional)
